message:
chore: add tests/logs/ to gitignore for ephemeral test output

Exclude test run logs from version control:
- tests/logs/*.log files are timestamped outputs from test runs
- Generated fresh on each test execution
- Not needed in repository history

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,3 +19,9 @@ Thumbs.db
 # Release artifacts (generated by CI)
 *.sha256
 checksums.txt
+
+# bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
+.bv/
+
+# Test artifacts (ephemeral logs)
+tests/logs/
